# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8000
    routes:
      - name: user-route
        paths:
          - /users
        strip_path: true

  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8000
    routes:
      - name: order-route
        paths:
          - /orders
        strip_path: true

upstreams:
  - name: user-service-upstream
    targets:
      - target: user-service1:8000
      - target: user-service2:8000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          http_failures: 3
  
  - name: order-service-upstream
    targets:
      - target: order-service1:8000
      - target: order-service2:8000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          http_failures: 3
